  • Method Details

    • active

      public PreIpoCompany.Builder active(boolean active)
      Whether the Pre IPO Company is currently active. Companies are updated to inactive if they experience a bankruptcy, shutdown, or similar corporate event.

    • active

      Whether the Pre IPO Company is currently active. Companies are updated to inactive if they experience a bankruptcy, shutdown, or similar corporate event.
